article_meta.title: Metro An open letter from the heart of Iran to America – Don’t give up on us By California Post Staff Published March 7, 2026, 7:11 p.m

reasoning: Classification is correct and well-supported by the author's own prose showing strong pro-Trump, hawkish, anti-left-media framing. Minor issue: one key_indicator cites the outlet’s general lean rather than the author’s prose.

custom_reasoning.classification_accuracy: The article’s first-person authorial voice praises Trump, criticizes Obama, endorses aggressive action, and attacks left-leaning media—clearly Right.
custom_reasoning.confidence_calibration: Bias signals are overt and consistent; 0.95 is appropriate for unambiguous lean.
custom_reasoning.reasoning_evidence_quality: Evidence mostly cites the author’s own framing (pro-Trump, anti-left-media, hawkish stances). Small deduction for using the outlet’s lean as an indicator rather than author prose.
